category_sources: Official Krew documentation is dedicated to installing, discovering, upgrading, and developing kubectl plugins.
source_facts.description says Krew is a package manager for kubectl plugins.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the project name Krew.
docs_sources: Official Krew documentation is hosted at krew.sigs.k8s.io/docs/.
source_facts.homepage uses sigs.k8s.io/krew, the Kubernetes SIG short URL for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Krew docs cover kubectl plugin installation, discovery, upgrades, and plugin development.
source_facts.description says package manager for kubectl plugins.
